memory.summary: Mina and Jae are pressuring me to skip studying for my midterm tomorrow. I'm tempted to go, but the extra review time is critical for my grades.
Midterm prep is finally paying off with solid progress, but Mina's last-minute invite feels like a trap to derail my focus. I'm ignoring it to protect my grades.

desires: Get to sleep by 11:00 PM so I can start my next study block at 6:00 AM without feeling groggy.
Finish that laundry load tonight; it's sitting in the machine and I don't want to deal with it tomorrow morning when I'll be rushing for class.
Tell Mina I'm too busy to hang out this week, then move on so I can focus entirely on getting an A.

goals.description: Sleep by 11:00 PM tonight to hit a 6 AM start time for the next study block.
goals.rationale: The midterm prep is officially done (100%), so I have zero reason to stay up grinding. My impulsive drive demands immediate reward and rest now, not some vague 'maybe later.' If I don't crush this sleep goal tonight, I'll be groggy tomorrow, which wastes the perfect window I just earned. The grade is already secured; my only variable left is recovery.

goals.description: Run the laundry load immediately after locking the door at 11:30 PM.
goals.rationale: It's sitting there and needs doing, but it's not the priority anymore. Since I'm sleeping anyway, I can defer it to post-sleep without guilt. It's low-effort maintenance compared to the high-stakes exam work, so I'll handle it as soon as I wake up or if I feel like it before bed, but I won't let it derail the sleep schedule.

goals.description: Send a blunt text to Mina declining the club invite and move on.
goals.rationale: I've already mentally cleared this boundary since the midterm deadline passed. Sending the text now would break my focus flow. I'll deal with it tomorrow morning when I'm awake and assertive, rather than letting it linger in my head while I try to sleep. It's not worth the cognitive drag right now.

agent.last_reasoning: Midterm is done; no reason to grind more. Sleep now to hit the 6 AM start window I earned. Skipping social tonight saves energy for tomorrow's high-stakes block.
